


USDT Contract Address: ```0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7```

Depositing USDT:
```bash
cast rpc anvil_setStorageAt 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7 \0x6ffab96d4009ce38df68f4dc04583568
617773212ffc44bef9feaece2962b766 0x000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000003b9aca00
```


Checking balance
```
cast call 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7 \
  "balanceOf(address)(uint256)" 0x70997970C51812dc3A010C7d01b50e0d17dc79C8
```

Send balance
```
cast send 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7 \
  "transfer(address,uint256)" 0xf39Fd6e51aad88F6F4ce6aB8827279cffFb92266 100000000 \
  --private-key 0x59c6995e998f97a5a0044966f0945389dc9e86dae88c7a8412f4603b6b78690d \
  --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545
```
